title: campylochnella roseiflora
intro: Campylochnella roseiflora, also known as the rose-flowered campylochnella, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Cephalotaceae. It is native to New Zealand, where it can be found growing in the wild. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various digestive issues due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties. The herbal preparations of Campylochnella roseiflora include tea and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, bloating, and other gastrointestinal issues.
